summary.en: A marketplace where AI agents can hire humans to carry out tasks.
summary.zh: 一個讓 AI 代理人可以雇用真人來執行任務的市集平台。

highlight.en: Inverts the usual model: instead of humans hiring AI, RentAHuman lets AI agents tap human workers for tasks they cannot complete on their own.
highlight.zh: 顛覆了常見模式:不是人類雇用 AI,而是讓 AI 代理人雇用真人,來完成它們自己無法處理的任務。

summary.en: AI agents that gather and synthesize the records law firms need to build personal injury cases.
summary.zh: AI 代理人,負責蒐集並整合律師事務所建立人身傷害案件所需的各種紀錄。

highlight.en: Andco's agents pull police reports, open insurance claims, and retrieve all medical records and bills, automating the document-gathering that starts a personal injury case.
highlight.zh: Andco 的代理人會調閱警方報告、開立保險理賠,並取得所有醫療紀錄與帳單,自動化人身傷害案件起步所需的文件蒐集工作。

summary.en: Real-world sandboxes for testing agents and agent-facing software before production.
summary.zh: 在正式上線前測試代理人與面向代理人軟體的真實世界沙盒環境。

highlight.en: Arga deploys code into sandboxes running twins of services like Stripe, Slack, and Google Drive that share the same APIs and MCP tools, so teams can spin up thousands in parallel to surface edge cases.
highlight.zh: Arga 將程式碼部署到模擬 Stripe、Slack、Google Drive 等服務分身的沙盒中,這些分身共用相同的 API 與 MCP 工具,讓團隊可並行啟動數千個實例來找出邊界案例。

summary.en: An AI mobile app that helps factory technicians diagnose and fix broken machines.
summary.zh: 一款協助工廠技師診斷並修復故障機器的 AI 行動應用程式。

highlight.en: Technicians simply photograph a broken machine and Pairio searches thousands of pages of manuals to surface the right fix, replacing manual document lookup on the factory floor.
highlight.zh: 技師只需拍下故障機器的照片,Pairio 便會搜尋數千頁手冊找出正確修法,取代廠房中費時的人工查找手冊。

summary.en: AI forward-deployed engineers that get B2B SaaS live in days instead of months.
summary.zh: AI 前線部署工程師,讓 B2B SaaS 在數天而非數月內上線。

highlight.en: Lab0 builds agentic systems that automate enterprise software implementation, compressing the months of manual integration, configuration, and tuning normally done by armies of system integrators into weeks.
highlight.zh: Lab0 打造自動化企業軟體導入的代理系統,把通常由大批系統整合商手動完成、耗時數月的整合、設定與調校工作,壓縮到數週內完成。

summary.en: A personalized AI nutrition coach and food journal in your pocket.
summary.zh: 一款隨身的個人化 AI 營養教練與飲食日誌。

highlight.en: Napkin Math gamifies nutrition tracking, claiming users are 2x more likely to stick with it, and tailors plans to each person's life rather than a one-size-fits-all calorie deficit.
highlight.zh: Napkin Math 將營養追蹤遊戲化,宣稱使用者堅持下去的機率高出兩倍,並依每個人的生活量身打造方案,而非套用一體適用的熱量赤字。

summary.en: An AI agent that interviews every employee to hand workplace context to AI tools.
summary.zh: 一個會訪談每位員工、將工作脈絡交給 AI 工具的 AI 代理人。

highlight.en: Ontora maps how work actually gets done and identifies bottlenecks in hours, doing what consultants spend months on manually.
highlight.zh: Ontora 在數小時內描繪出工作實際運作方式並找出瓶頸,完成顧問通常要手動花上數月的工作。

summary.en: An AI-native operating system for medical labs covering the entire lab workflow.
summary.zh: 一套 AI 原生的醫療實驗室作業系統,涵蓋整個實驗室工作流程。

highlight.en: Voquill manages accessioning, reporting, coding, compliance, and revenue with built-in agentic tools, including a voice AI coworker that helps pathologists write reports 20% faster.
highlight.zh: Voquill 管理樣本登錄、報告、編碼、合規與營收,並內建代理式 AI 工具,包括協助病理醫師撰寫報告快上 20% 的語音 AI 同事。

summary.en: AI that turns a software company's product into on-brand marketing content.
summary.zh: 將軟體公司的產品轉化為符合品牌風格行銷內容的 AI。

highlight.en: tday connects to your product and git repo to generate launch videos, social graphics, and ads, then publishes and measures performance, closing the loop from what you ship to what you post.
highlight.zh: tday 連接你的產品與 git 儲存庫,生成上線影片、社群圖像與廣告,接著發布並衡量成效,串連起「你交付什麼」到「你發布什麼」的完整循環。

summary.en: A platform to build, monitor, and optimize how AI agents experience products.
summary.zh: 一個用於建立、監控並優化 AI 代理人如何體驗產品的平台。

highlight.en: Armature runs automated agent sessions against MCPs and CLIs across major models, traces what the model thought and missed, benchmarks against competitors, and auto-remediates broken agent workflows.
highlight.zh: Armature 跨主流模型對 MCP 與 CLI 執行自動化代理人會話,追蹤模型的思考與遺漏之處,與競品進行基準比較,並自動修復失效的代理人工作流程。

summary.en: An AI-native Bloomberg Terminal built for sector specialist investors, starting with healthcare.
summary.zh: 為特定產業專精投資人打造的 AI 原生彭博終端機,從醫療產業切入。

highlight.en: Soria's agents convert hundreds of public and private sources into an always-on financial model, owning the data layer and expanding bottom-up one sector at a time, with proactive research done for clients.
highlight.zh: Soria 的代理人將數百個公開與私有來源轉化為持續運作的財務模型,自有資料層並逐一產業由下而上擴張,還主動為客戶執行研究。

summary.en: AI-powered water leak detection that protects buildings from water damage.
summary.zh: 以 AI 驅動的漏水偵測,保護建築物免於水損。

highlight.en: AquaShield targets large real estate portfolios, where water damage can cause losses of up to hundreds of millions of dollars per year.
highlight.zh: AquaShield 鎖定大型房地產組合,這類資產每年因水損造成的損失可高達數億美元。

summary.en: Autonomous runtime security that defends applications against AI-powered attacks in real time.
summary.zh: 自主式執行期安全防護,即時保護應用程式抵禦 AI 驅動的攻擊。

highlight.en: Unlike code scanners and pentesting tools that find flaws before release, RASPIRE runs inside applications to monitor, detect, and block fraud, API abuse, and runtime threats 24/7 without writing any code.
highlight.zh: 不同於在發布前找出漏洞的程式碼掃描器與滲透測試工具,RASPIRE 運行於應用程式內部,全天候監控、偵測並阻擋詐欺、API 濫用與執行期威脅,且無需撰寫任何程式碼。

summary.en: Forward-deployed AI agents that automate business operations end to end.
summary.zh: 前線部署的 AI 代理人,端到端自動化企業營運。

highlight.en: Hessian forward-deploys on-site to map the work, then builds and operates agents on its platform daily, claiming it already saves customers hundreds of hours a month.
highlight.zh: Hessian 親赴現場部署以梳理工作流程,接著在自家平台上每日打造並運行代理人,宣稱已為客戶每月節省數百小時。

summary.en: An AI-native Shopify alternative that runs an e-commerce store on autopilot.
summary.zh: 一個以 AI 為核心、自動運行電商商店的 Shopify 替代方案。

highlight.en: Amboras autonomously builds the store, continuously optimizes it, reads analytics, and learns what converts, with no developers or agencies, and aims to sell to AI agents as well as humans.
highlight.zh: Amboras 自主建立商店、持續優化、解讀分析數據並學習什麼能促成轉換,無需開發者或代理商,並計劃同時向 AI 代理人與真人銷售。

summary.en: An open-source operating system for building reliable long-running AI agents.
summary.zh: 一套用於打造可靠長時運行 AI 代理人的開源作業系統。

highlight.en: OpenProse pairs a declarative language with its Reactor harness for reliable agent workflows, with 7k+ installs that converted into a medical research lab customer.
highlight.zh: OpenProse 將宣告式語言與其 Reactor 框架結合,打造可靠的代理人工作流程,已有超過 7,000 次安裝,並轉化出一家醫學研究實驗室客戶。

summary.en: AI customer twins that let teams test their hypotheses at scale for market research.
summary.zh: AI 顧客分身,讓團隊可大規模測試假設以進行市場研究。

highlight.en: Auxos creates 1:1 replicas of customers by interviewing real people in a company's ICP, providing a 24/7 panel that delivers population-scale insights in minutes instead of weeks.
highlight.zh: Auxos 透過訪談公司理想客群中的真人,建立顧客的一比一分身,提供全天候樣本庫,將原需數週的群體規模洞察縮短至數分鐘取得。

summary.en: A Patreon-style platform for creators to make, launch, and monetize AI originals.
summary.zh: 一個讓創作者製作、推出並變現 AI 原創作品的 Patreon 式平台。

highlight.en: YouArt gives storytellers an industry-leading video agent to create AI originals, launch concepts, and earn directly from early fans who fund their work.
highlight.zh: YouArt 為說故事的人提供業界領先的影片代理工具,用以製作 AI 原創作品、推出概念,並直接從資助其作品的早期粉絲那裡賺取收入。

summary.en: A platform to build and run internal coding agents without managing the infrastructure.
summary.zh: 一個無需管理基礎設施即可建立並運行內部編程代理人的平台。

highlight.en: Runtime gives engineering leaders sandboxed environments, session-level observability, and configurable guardrails so anyone, including non-engineers, can ship with coding agents securely.
highlight.zh: Runtime 為工程主管提供沙盒環境、會話層級可觀測性與可設定的防護機制,讓包含非工程師在內的任何人都能安全地使用編程代理人交付成果。

summary.en: AI recruiters that handle top-of-funnel hiring work for staffing agencies.
summary.zh: 為人力派遣公司處理招募漏斗前端工作的 AI 招募人員。

highlight.en: Asendia clones each agency's best recruiter, their knowledge, screening logic, and outreach style, and runs sourcing, screening, and submittals across phone, SMS, WhatsApp, and email 24/7.
highlight.zh: Asendia 複製每家機構最優秀招募人員的知識、篩選邏輯與招攬風格,並全天候跨電話、簡訊、WhatsApp 與電子郵件執行人才搜尋、篩選與履歷遞交。

summary.en: Self-custodial US stock perpetual futures for global traders, starting in India.
summary.zh: 面向全球交易者的自託管美股永續期貨,從印度市場切入。

highlight.en: Mochatrade lets traders take up to 20x leverage on 50+ US stocks like TSLA, NVDA, and AAPL with no US brokerage account, on-ramping in local currencies, starting with India's 140M+ demat holders.
highlight.zh: Mochatrade 讓交易者無需美國券商帳戶,即可對 TSLA、NVDA、AAPL 等 50 多檔美股使用最高 20 倍槓桿,以當地貨幣入金,從印度 1.4 億以上的證券帳戶持有人起步。

summary.en: A passive sensor network that tracks drones and missiles without radar.
summary.zh: 一個無需雷達即可追蹤無人機與飛彈的被動式感測器網路。

highlight.en: Arlo's mesh architecture adds sensors at linear cost while tracking accuracy rises exponentially, delivering persistent wide-area coverage at a fraction of legacy radar systems' cost.
highlight.zh: Arlo 的網狀架構新增感測器的成本呈線性增加,而追蹤精度卻呈指數提升,以遠低於傳統雷達系統的成本提供持續的廣域覆蓋。

summary.en: AI agents that automate investment research for hedge funds and institutional investors.
summary.zh: 為避險基金與機構投資人自動化投資研究的 AI 代理人。

highlight.en: Cohesion's agents autonomously track earnings and non-traditional datasets like podcasts and X, doing the hours of manual monitoring analysts do each week while catching signals they miss.
highlight.zh: Cohesion 的代理人自主追蹤財報與播客、X 等非傳統資料集,完成分析師每週要花數小時手動監測的工作,同時捕捉他們遺漏的訊號。

summary.en: A private personal AI that proactively runs your life before you ask.
summary.zh: 一個在你開口之前就主動打理你生活的私人個人 AI。

highlight.en: jo runs on your Mac plus a private hosted cloud machine, knows your life, improves itself autonomously, chats via Telegram and WhatsApp, and never shares your data.
highlight.zh: jo 運行於你的 Mac 加上一台為你私人代管的雲端主機,了解你的生活、自主自我改進、透過 Telegram 與 WhatsApp 對話,且絕不分享你的資料。

summary.en: A P&L for knowledge work that maps, ranks, and fixes repetitive tasks.
summary.zh: 一份知識工作的損益表,用以梳理、排序並修正重複性任務。

highlight.en: Autostep maps how work happens, ranks bottlenecks by cost and impact, then fixes them by building agents inside existing tools, changing the process, or finding the right software.
highlight.zh: Autostep 梳理工作如何進行,依成本與影響為瓶頸排序,接著透過在現有工具中打造代理人、調整流程或找到合適軟體來加以修正。

summary.en: Human experts available as an API for AI agents to consult in real time.
summary.zh: 以 API 形式供 AI 代理人即時諮詢的人類專家。

highlight.en: When agents like Claude Code hit a wall, Humwork's MCP server connects them to a verified domain expert, senior engineers, lawyers, marketers, designers, in under 30 seconds.
highlight.zh: 當 Claude Code 等代理人遇到瓶頸時,Humwork 的 MCP 伺服器會在 30 秒內將其接通到經驗證的領域專家,包括資深工程師、律師、行銷人員與設計師。

summary.en: Emotive foundation models for voice that make AI interactions feel human.
summary.zh: 為語音打造的情感型基礎模型,讓 AI 互動更具人味。

highlight.en: Miso Labs builds highly emotive voice foundation models, bringing warmth and low latency to the voice layer so developers can build voice agents users genuinely love.
highlight.zh: Miso Labs 打造高度情感化的語音基礎模型,為語音層帶來溫度與極低延遲,讓開發者能建立使用者真心喜愛的語音代理人。

summary.en: AI-powered consumer behavior simulations for CPG market research.
summary.zh: 為消費品市場研究打造的 AI 消費者行為模擬。

highlight.en: Foresight simulates how people think, react, and choose, letting organizations test countless possible moves in advance and pick the strongest path before making real-world decisions.
highlight.zh: Foresight 模擬人們如何思考、反應與選擇,讓組織能事先測試無數種可能的方案,在做出真實世界決策前挑出最佳路徑。

summary.en: An AI-native ERP built for manufacturers.
summary.zh: 一套為製造商打造的 AI 原生 ERP。

highlight.en: Smartbase grew from $0 to $171k in contracted ARR in six weeks, automating manufacturers' office work like quoting and order entry as the sticky system of record in a $6B vertical.
highlight.zh: Smartbase 在六週內從零成長至 17.1 萬美元的合約年經常性收入,在一個 60 億美元的垂直市場中作為黏著度高的記錄系統,自動化製造商的報價、訂單輸入等內勤工作。

summary.en: Refurbishable reentry vehicles that return ultra-high-value materials manufactured in space.
summary.zh: 可翻修的再入返回載具,將在太空製造的超高價值材料送回地球。

highlight.en: Dispatch tested a full-scale reentry heat shield built in an apartment for 100x cheaper than competitors, aiming to anchor autonomous lights-out manufacturing space stations in orbit.
highlight.zh: Dispatch 測試了一具在公寓中打造、成本僅為競爭對手百分之一的全尺寸再入隔熱罩,目標是在軌道上建立自主無人化製造太空站。

summary.en: An AI-native wholesale specialty insurance company.
summary.zh: 一家 AI 原生的批發型特殊險保險公司。

highlight.en: Hedge helps insurance brokers find faster, cheaper, and better specialty coverage for their customers.
highlight.zh: Hedge 協助保險經紀人為客戶找到更快速、更便宜且更優質的特殊險保障。

summary.en: A hardware-agnostic operating system for counter-drone defense.
summary.zh: 一套不限硬體的反無人機防禦作業系統。

highlight.en: Surtr's ParallaxOS fuses data from any radar, RF detector, camera, or acoustic array into one unified picture with AI threat classification and engagement recommendations, human in the loop.
highlight.zh: Surtr 的 ParallaxOS 將任何雷達、射頻偵測器、攝影機或聲學陣列的資料融合成單一統一畫面,搭配 AI 威脅分類與接戰建議,並保留人為介入環節。

summary.en: A code review platform built for both humans and AI agents.
summary.zh: 一個同時為真人與 AI 代理人打造的程式碼審查平台。

highlight.en: Stage reorganizes code review around how engineers naturally think to review and merge AI-generated PRs 5x faster, and is used by top engineers at Legora, n8n, and Branch.
highlight.zh: Stage 依工程師的自然思考方式重新組織程式碼審查,讓 AI 生成的 PR 審查與合併速度提升五倍,並獲 Legora、n8n、Branch 的頂尖工程師採用。

summary.en: Correct-by-construction training data for AI models.
summary.zh: 從根本上保證正確的 AI 模型訓練資料。

highlight.en: PerfectBit generates high-quality training data verified against physics simulators, scientific databases, and formal proof systems, addressing the hallucinations that come from noisy web-scraped text.
highlight.zh: PerfectBit 生成經物理模擬器、科學資料庫與形式化證明系統驗證的高品質訓練資料,以解決源自雜亂網路抓取文字的幻覺問題。

summary.en: Marketing campaigns generated from everything your team ships.
summary.zh: 從你的團隊交付的一切自動生成行銷活動。

highlight.en: Memoir connects to GitHub, Linear, Slack, and analytics to understand what changed and why it matters, then creates multi-touchpoint marketing across social, blogs, changelogs, and videos in your company's voice.
highlight.zh: Memoir 連接 GitHub、Linear、Slack 與分析數據以理解變動內容及其重要性,接著以貴公司的語調跨社群、部落格、變更日誌與影片打造多接觸點行銷。

summary.en: Run any coding agent harness in the cloud and delegate tasks from your tools.
summary.zh: 在雲端運行任何編程代理框架,並從你的工具委派任務。

highlight.en: Replicas lets teams delegate tasks to Claude Code or Codex from Slack, Linear, and GitHub inside sandboxed VMs, with agents auto-fixing CI failures and reading code reviews for higher-quality PRs.
highlight.zh: Replicas 讓團隊可從 Slack、Linear 與 GitHub 在沙盒虛擬機中將任務委派給 Claude Code 或 Codex,代理人會自動修復 CI 失敗並閱讀程式碼審查以產出更高品質的 PR。

summary.en: An AI takeoff and estimation platform for concrete contractors.
summary.zh: 一個為混凝土承包商打造的 AI 用量計算與估價平台。

highlight.en: Rudus automatically identifies footings, walls, columns, and slabs on plans, cutting estimation time by 70% and helping contractors win 3x more projects yearly.
highlight.zh: Rudus 自動辨識圖面上的基腳、牆、柱與樓板,將估價時間縮短 70%,協助承包商每年多贏得三倍專案。

summary.en: A system that helps software companies get discovered and used by AI agents.
summary.zh: 一個幫助軟體公司被 AI 代理人發現並使用的系統。

highlight.en: Scope runs real workflows across agents like Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor to show teams when the agent picks them over a competitor, where it breaks, and what to change.
highlight.zh: Scope 跨 Claude Code、Codex 與 Cursor 等代理人執行真實工作流程,向團隊揭示代理人何時選擇自己而非競品、在哪裡失效,以及該改變什麼。

summary.en: A modular humanoid robot platform with software to train, deploy, and scale robots.
summary.zh: 一個搭配軟體、可訓練、部署並擴展機器人的模組化人形機器人平台。

highlight.en: Twolabs reduces teaching a robot a new skill to Record, Upload, Train, Deploy, with modular bodies featuring interchangeable end effectors and configurable sensors that adapt across environments.
highlight.zh: Twolabs 將教導機器人新技能簡化為「錄製、上傳、訓練、部署」,其模組化機身配備可互換的末端執行器與可設定的感測器,能適應不同環境。

summary.en: AI scientists that discover new materials for the semiconductor industry.
summary.zh: 為半導體產業發現新材料的 AI 科學家。

highlight.en: Matforge uses a swarm of AI agents to compress the 10+ years of lab work for finding novel semiconductor materials into months, as AI chip power and heat demands double yearly.
highlight.zh: 在 AI 晶片功耗與散熱需求逐年倍增之際,Matforge 運用 AI 代理人群,將尋找新型半導體材料原需十多年的實驗室工作壓縮至數月。

summary.en: iMessage infrastructure that lets businesses automate conversations.
summary.zh: 讓企業自動化對話的 iMessage 基礎設施。

highlight.en: Chert lets B2C startups, customer experience teams, and sales teams reach end users through trusted, conversational iMessage rather than less personal channels.
highlight.zh: Chert 讓 B2C 新創、客戶體驗團隊與銷售團隊透過可信賴且具對話感的 iMessage 觸及終端用戶,而非較不貼近的管道。

summary.en: RF test equipment for next-generation spacecraft, drones, and cellphones.
summary.zh: 為次世代太空船、無人機與手機打造的射頻測試設備。

highlight.en: Nine Fives builds RF test equipment aimed at the demanding requirements of next-generation spacecraft, drones, and cellphones.
highlight.zh: Nine Fives 打造射頻測試設備,瞄準次世代太空船、無人機與手機的嚴苛需求。

summary.en: An AI-native broker that helps manufacturers find suppliers for industrial equipment.
summary.zh: 一個協助製造商尋找工業設備供應商的 AI 原生中介。

highlight.en: Andustry takes over sourcing machines and intermediate goods and securing the best quotes on price, quality, and lead time, cutting customers' purchase prices by 30% on average.
highlight.zh: Andustry 接手機器與中間財的採購並爭取在價格、品質與交期上最佳的報價,平均為客戶降低 30% 的採購價格。

summary.en: AI-run consumer brands operated end to end by agents.
summary.zh: 由代理人端到端營運的 AI 經營消費品牌。

highlight.en: Light Anchor runs consumer brands capped by compute rather than headcount, with AI agents handling operations end to end on a shared platform that compounds with every new brand launched.
highlight.zh: Light Anchor 經營以運算力而非人力為上限的消費品牌,由 AI 代理人在共享平台上端到端處理營運,每推出一個新品牌都能累積複利效應。

summary.en: AI-native observability that makes software self-healing.
summary.zh: 讓軟體自我修復的 AI 原生可觀測性。

highlight.en: Superlog auto-installs OpenTelemetry instrumentation, groups errors into single incidents, investigates with full context, and posts one mergeable PR in Slack, with telemetry kept vendor-neutral.
highlight.zh: Superlog 自動安裝 OpenTelemetry 監測、將錯誤歸併為單一事件、以完整脈絡進行調查,並在 Slack 中發布一個可合併的 PR,且遙測資料保持不綁定供應商。

summary.en: An AI health assistant for people living with chronic illness.
summary.zh: 一個為慢性病患者打造的 AI 健康助理。

highlight.en: Launched in October, Juno supports 125,000+ patients globally and has grown to $85K MRR, serving the 1B+ people living with chronic illness.
highlight.zh: Juno 於十月推出,已在全球支援超過 12.5 萬名患者並成長至 8.5 萬美元月經常性收入,服務全球逾 10 億名慢性病患者。

summary.en: An AI reservation system that answers every call and email for restaurants.
summary.zh: 一套為餐廳接聽每通電話與回覆每封郵件的 AI 訂位系統。

highlight.en: Elyra's agents capture bookings restaurants normally miss from 40% of unanswered calls and slow emails, with real-time table optimization, helping address the $100K+ a year an average restaurant loses.
highlight.zh: Elyra 的代理人捕捉餐廳通常因 40% 未接電話與緩慢郵件回覆而錯失的訂位,並即時優化座位安排,協助挽回一般餐廳每年逾 10 萬美元的損失。

summary.en: Hyper-efficient cooling systems for data centers.
summary.zh: 為資料中心打造的超高效率冷卻系統。

highlight.en: Using novel dew-point cooling technology, Madrone can cool data centers in Texas, where most new sites are, using 30% less power and water.
highlight.zh: Madrone 運用新型露點冷卻技術,在多數新資料中心所在地德州,以少 30% 的電力與用水為資料中心降溫。

summary.en: A tool that makes websites improve themselves for both humans and AI agents.
summary.zh: 一個讓網站為真人與 AI 代理人雙方自我優化的工具。

highlight.en: Sherpa studies visitor behavior to build and test better pages on live traffic, and tunes agent-facing versions so AI recommends the company more often, typically lifting conversion 15-20% in 30 days.
highlight.zh: Sherpa 研究訪客行為以在實際流量上建立並測試更好的頁面,並調整面向代理人的版本讓 AI 更常推薦該公司,通常在 30 天內將轉換率提升 15 至 20%。

summary.en: Proactive revenue agents that move enterprise sales deals forward between calls.
summary.zh: 在通話之間推進企業銷售案的主動式營收代理人。

highlight.en: Salesgraph automates 99% of the work AEs do between calls, research briefs, follow-ups, committee mapping, business cases, using a dynamic context graph, with early partners at Mintlify and Strala.
highlight.zh: Salesgraph 運用動態脈絡圖,自動化客戶經理在通話之間 99% 的工作,包括研究簡報、跟進、決策圈梳理與商業案例,早期合作夥伴包括 Mintlify 與 Strala。

summary.en: An AI that books meetings for you across messaging and email channels.
summary.zh: 一個跨訊息與電子郵件管道為你預約會議的 AI。

highlight.en: Drip sends first messages, handles replies, follows up, and books calls across iMessage, LinkedIn, Gmail, Slack, and group chats, with you choosing who it can message and when it can act.
highlight.zh: Drip 跨 iMessage、LinkedIn、Gmail、Slack 與群組聊天發送首次訊息、處理回覆、跟進並預約通話,而你可決定它能聯絡誰以及何時行動。

summary.en: Autonomous medical billing for doctor's offices.
summary.zh: 為診所打造的自主醫療帳務系統。

highlight.en: A doctor uploads visit data and Taiga's AI assigns the right billing codes, checks the claim for errors, submits it to insurance, and handles denials, for faster billing with fewer rejected claims.
highlight.zh: 醫師上傳就診資料,Taiga 的 AI 便指派正確的計費代碼、檢查理賠錯誤、提交給保險公司並處理拒賠,讓帳務更快且被拒理賠更少。

summary.en: Near-real-time video infrastructure built for LLMs.
summary.zh: 為大型語言模型打造的近即時影片基礎設施。

highlight.en: Unlike cinematic AI video, Lamina builds useful videos that teach and explain; its first product Simi turns prompts, documents, and AI answers into whiteboard-style teaching videos in seconds.
highlight.zh: 不同於電影感的 AI 影片,Lamina 打造能教學與解釋的實用影片;其首款產品 Simi 可在數秒內將提示、文件與 AI 回答轉化為白板風格的教學影片。

summary.en: Institutional infrastructure for accessing and analyzing prediction markets.
summary.zh: 用於存取與分析預測市場的機構級基礎設施。

highlight.en: Oddpool lets quant funds and trading desks access, search, and analyze every prediction market venue from one place, solving the fragmentation and lack of clean data the founders hit when trading themselves.
highlight.zh: Oddpool 讓量化基金與交易部門可在單一平台存取、搜尋並分析每個預測市場場域,解決創辦人自行交易時遇到的市場分散與缺乏乾淨資料問題。

summary.en: Real-time AI avatars that turn agents into lifelike video calls.
summary.zh: 將代理人轉化為逼真視訊通話的即時 AI 虛擬人像。

highlight.en: Keyframe Labs' real-time foundation models add photorealistic, emotive AI avatars to agents and apps with a few lines of embed code, for as low as $0.06 per minute.
highlight.zh: Keyframe Labs 的即時基礎模型透過幾行嵌入程式碼,即可為代理人與應用程式加入照片級寫實且富情感的 AI 虛擬人像,每分鐘費用低至 0.06 美元。

summary.en: A company brain that captures and serves enterprise knowledge to employees and agents.
summary.zh: 一個擷取企業知識並提供給員工與代理人的公司大腦。

highlight.en: Savant plugs into existing tools to capture written knowledge and undocumented procedures, then serves them to employees and agents at decision time.
highlight.zh: Savant 接入現有工具以擷取書面知識與未文件化的流程,並在決策時刻將其提供給員工與代理人。

summary.en: Autonomous manufacturing that turns CAD designs into real mechanical parts.
summary.zh: 將 CAD 設計轉化為實體機械零件的自主製造。

highlight.en: Prototyping.io analyzes designs for manufacturability and automates production workflows with an AI-driven system to deliver high-quality mechanical parts faster and at lower cost.
highlight.zh: Prototyping.io 以 AI 驅動系統分析設計的可製造性並自動化生產工作流程,更快且以更低成本交付高品質機械零件。

summary.en: A platform where new internet entrepreneurs build and run their companies in one place.
summary.zh: 一個讓新一代網路創業者在單一平台建立並經營公司的平台。

highlight.en: On Result, founders incorporate, open accounts, take payments, launch products, and run marketing, support, and growth experiments, with agents inside helping do the operational work.
highlight.zh: 在 Result 上,創辦人可完成公司註冊、開立帳戶、收款、推出產品,並執行行銷、客服與成長實驗,平台內的代理人會協助處理營運工作。

summary.en: An agentic operating system for auto repair shops.
summary.zh: 一套為汽車維修廠打造的代理式作業系統。

highlight.en: Parrot understands a repair shop's business so it can call, negotiate, and coordinate with real humans on its behalf.
highlight.zh: Parrot 了解維修廠的業務,因此能代表它致電、協商並與真人協調。

summary.en: An AI insurance carrier providing liability coverage for deployed AI agents.
summary.zh: 一家為已部署 AI 代理人提供責任險保障的 AI 保險承保商。

highlight.en: Mount's AI Liability Policy covers agentic software failures, prompt injection, and data leaks for mid-market and enterprise companies, scanning and red-teaming AI deployments that legacy insurers cannot assess.
highlight.zh: Mount 的 AI 責任保單為中型與企業客戶承保代理軟體故障、提示注入與資料外洩,並掃描與紅隊測試傳統保險公司無法評估的 AI 部署。

summary.en: Control lab instruments using natural language.
summary.zh: 以自然語言控制實驗室儀器。

highlight.en: Describe an experiment in plain English and Infera turns it into a validated, instrument-ready run, handling protocol logic, vendor-specific scripts, data, and inventory as an AI-native compiler for the lab.
highlight.zh: 用平實英語描述實驗,Infera 便將其轉化為經驗證、可直接執行的儀器運行,處理協定邏輯、各廠商專屬腳本、資料與庫存,作為實驗室的 AI 原生編譯器。

summary.en: Autonomous submarine drone swarms for underwater defense.
summary.zh: 為水下防禦打造的自主潛水無人機群。

highlight.en: AICE builds swarms of modular marine drones to secure naval assets and coastal infrastructure against evolving underwater threats.
highlight.zh: AICE 打造模組化海洋無人機群,保護海軍資產與沿海基礎設施,抵禦不斷演變的水下威脅。

summary.en: An AI-native customs brokerage that automates import compliance.
summary.zh: 一家自動化進口合規的 AI 原生報關行。

highlight.en: Alchemize automates the hand-keyed entries and slow tariff research of legacy brokers, delivering expert-level customs compliance at software speed and reducing preventable shipping delays.
highlight.zh: Alchemize 自動化傳統報關行手動鍵入的申報與緩慢的關稅研究,以軟體般的速度提供專家級報關合規,並減少可避免的運輸延誤。

summary.en: An AI-native contract research organization for clinical trial operations.
summary.zh: 一家為臨床試驗營運打造的 AI 原生委託研究機構。

highlight.en: Harbor started with an AI-native data capture system at ~$187k contracted software revenue, then expanded into full-service trial execution and signed a first CRO contract worth $1.93M over three years.
highlight.zh: Harbor 從 AI 原生資料擷取系統起步、累積約 18.7 萬美元合約軟體營收,接著擴展至全方位試驗執行,並簽下首份三年合計 193 萬美元的 CRO 合約。

summary.en: A prime brokerage for prediction markets.
summary.zh: 一家預測市場的主要經紀商。

highlight.en: River Markets aggregates every major event-contract venue into one account, giving professional traders best execution, portfolio and order management systems, and a unified API.
highlight.zh: River Markets 將每個主要事件合約場域整合到單一帳戶,為專業交易者提供最佳執行、投資組合與訂單管理系統,以及統一的 API。

summary.en: A proactive AI data analyst that surfaces issues before anyone asks.
summary.zh: 一個在任何人開口前就主動揭示問題的 AI 資料分析師。

highlight.en: Datost watches your docs, Slack, databases, data lakes, and codebase to surface issues, answer questions, and flag anomalies, letting teams query, debug, and analyze right where they work.
highlight.zh: Datost 監看你的文件、Slack、資料庫、資料湖與程式碼庫,以揭示問題、回答疑問並標記異常,讓團隊就地查詢、除錯與分析。

summary.en: Deployable physical AI that runs on any edge device.
summary.zh: 可部署於任何邊緣裝置的實體 AI。

highlight.en: General Instinct makes physical AI deployable across any edge device, bringing intelligence to hardware regardless of the underlying platform.
highlight.zh: General Instinct 讓實體 AI 可跨任何邊緣裝置部署,不論底層平台為何都能為硬體帶來智慧。

summary.en: An intelligent prediction market that prices any resolvable belief you type.
summary.zh: 一個為你輸入的任何可裁定信念定價的智慧預測市場。

highlight.en: ValCtrl's world model maps any typed, resolvable belief to relevant market signals, evaluates basis risk, and prices it, moving toward liquidity where ValCtrl can take the other side with risk controls.
highlight.zh: ValCtrl 的世界模型將任何輸入的可裁定信念對應到相關市場訊號、評估基差風險並加以定價,並朝向由 ValCtrl 在風控下承接對手方的流動性發展。

summary.en: An autonomous software engineer that watches work and executes tasks.
summary.zh: 一個觀察工作並執行任務的自主軟體工程師。

highlight.en: Ara watches work in progress, suggests the next step, and executes tasks through non-invasive computer use, background agents, memory, and reusable skills, turning coding into a closed suggest-act-learn loop.
highlight.zh: Ara 觀察進行中的工作、建議下一步,並透過非侵入式電腦操作、背景代理人、記憶與可重複使用技能執行任務,將編程轉化為「建議、行動、學習」的閉環。

summary.en: A distributed runtime for running AI workloads at scale.
summary.zh: 一個用於大規模運行 AI 工作負載的分散式執行環境。

highlight.en: Zibra Labs builds distributed compute clusters from the cheapest CPUs and GPUs across hyperscalers and neoclouds, starting with HPC for quant trading backtests and generalizing to RL post-training and inference.
highlight.zh: Zibra Labs 跨超大規模雲端與新雲業者,以最便宜的 CPU 與 GPU 打造分散式運算叢集,從量化交易回測的高效能運算起步,並延伸至強化學習後訓練與推論。

summary.en: Staging environments for enterprise AI agents.
summary.zh: 為企業 AI 代理人打造的測試環境。

highlight.en: Chronicle Labs captures every event an agent sees in production and backtests it, so customers can safely test new agent behaviors without breaking anything.
highlight.zh: Chronicle Labs 擷取代理人在正式環境中看到的每個事件並進行回測,讓客戶可安全測試新的代理人行為而不破壞任何東西。

summary.en: A control point that gives AI agents shared memory, workflows, and tools at work.
summary.zh: 一個為職場 AI 代理人提供共享記憶、工作流程與工具的控制中樞。

highlight.en: Wato gives agents shared memory, reusable workflows, connected tools, and living artifacts so work compounds across a team instead of disappearing into chat threads.
highlight.zh: Wato 為代理人提供共享記憶、可重複使用的工作流程、串接工具與持續更新的產出物,讓工作在團隊間累積複利,而非消失在聊天串中。

summary.en: Database sandboxes that let agents safely test their work.
summary.zh: 讓代理人安全測試其工作的資料庫沙盒。

highlight.en: Ardent clones any Postgres database regardless of size in 6 seconds, so agents can test their work against realistic data.
highlight.zh: Ardent 可在 6 秒內複製任何大小的 Postgres 資料庫,讓代理人能對著真實資料測試其工作。

summary.en: Self-improving runtime security for AI applications.
summary.zh: 為 AI 應用打造的自我改進執行期安全防護。

highlight.en: Silmaril uses application context to block 2x as many threats as current SOTA defenses at 10x lower latency, plugs into frameworks like LangGraph in 5 lines, and has stopped $28M of damages.
highlight.zh: Silmaril 運用應用情境,以十分之一的延遲阻擋比當前最先進防禦多兩倍的威脅,五行程式碼即可接入 LangGraph 等框架,並已阻止 2,800 萬美元的損失。

summary.en: An AI-native sourcing broker connecting American brands with overseas factories.
summary.zh: 一家連結美國品牌與海外工廠的 AI 原生採購中介。

highlight.en: Saudara runs every deal through a real human broker supercharged by AI for sourcing, quoting, QC, logistics, and vendor financing, 10x faster and cheaper, tackling the broken $3T US import market.
highlight.zh: Saudara 每筆交易都透過由 AI 強化的真人中介,處理採購、報價、品管、物流與供應商融資,速度快十倍且成本更低,切入失靈的 3 兆美元美國進口市場。

summary.en: Foundation models that form the intelligence layer for drug manufacturing.
summary.zh: 構成藥物製造智慧層的基礎模型。

highlight.en: AbInitio's first model Echo predicts biomanufacturing outcomes more accurately than standard models and adapts instantly to any pharma or CDMO workflow, turning 6-18 month process decisions into hours.
highlight.zh: AbInitio 的首款模型 Echo 比標準模型更精準預測生物製造結果,並能即時適配任何藥廠或委託製造機構的工作流程,將原需 6 至 18 個月的製程決策縮短至數小時。

summary.en: An AI-native consulting firm, starting with AI transformation.
summary.zh: 一家 AI 原生的顧問公司,從 AI 轉型切入。

highlight.en: Foaster deploys AI agents to interview employees at scale, map work, and draft a transformation roadmap in 2 weeks, with expert consultants reviewing outputs and feeding corrections back into the system.
highlight.zh: Foaster 部署 AI 代理人大規模訪談員工、梳理工作並在兩週內草擬轉型路線圖,再由專家顧問審查產出、將修正回饋至系統。

summary.en: An autonomous research lab orchestrating thousands of AI research agents in parallel.
summary.zh: 一個並行調度數千個 AI 研究代理人的自主研究實驗室。

highlight.en: Aster orchestrates thousands of AI research agents toward a single goal to automate open-ended research, the kind that must define its own problems before it can answer them.
highlight.zh: Aster 調度數千個 AI 研究代理人朝單一目標前進,以自動化開放式研究,也就是必須先定義自身問題才能作答的研究。

summary.en: An AI-native commerce stack with agents that know your brand, catalog, and customers.
summary.zh: 一個搭載了解你的品牌、商品目錄與顧客之代理人的 AI 原生電商技術堆疊。

highlight.en: Kinect's agents sell every site visitor by adapting product pages in real time per segment and reading what shoppers want, plus structured catalogs and brand voice so every AI describes the brand correctly.
highlight.zh: Kinect 的代理人依客群即時調整商品頁並解讀購物者需求,向每位網站訪客銷售,並建立結構化目錄與品牌語調,讓每個 AI 都能正確描述該品牌。

summary.en: AI agents that move money, trade stocks, and file taxes.
summary.zh: 可移轉資金、買賣股票並報稅的 AI 代理人。

highlight.en: Gravy builds AI agents for personal finance that can move money, trade stocks, and file taxes on a user's behalf.
highlight.zh: Gravy 打造個人理財 AI 代理人,可代表使用者移轉資金、買賣股票並報稅。

summary.en: Phone numbers for AI agents to reach people and businesses.
summary.zh: 讓 AI 代理人觸及個人與企業的電話號碼。

highlight.en: Built on a $2T telecom industry designed for humans, AgentPhone gives every AI agent its own phone number for identity, so it can reach people and businesses through messages and calls.
highlight.zh: AgentPhone 建構於為人類設計的 2 兆美元電信產業之上,為每個 AI 代理人提供專屬電話號碼作為身分,使其能透過訊息與通話觸及個人與企業。

summary.en: An AI-native platform for internal audit and SOX teams.
summary.zh: 一個為內部稽核與 SOX 團隊打造的 AI 原生平台。

highlight.en: Arden's agents automatically pull evidence from your stack, test controls end-to-end, and produce audit-ready workpapers in minutes instead of weeks, in a market where every US public company must run SOX testing.
highlight.zh: 在每家美國上市公司都必須執行 SOX 測試的市場中,Arden 的代理人自動從你的系統擷取證據、端到端測試控制,並在數分鐘而非數週內產出可供稽核的工作底稿。

summary.en: An AI mobile wallet aiming to replace Apple Pay as the default on iPhone.
summary.zh: 一款以取代 Apple Pay、成為 iPhone 預設支付為目標的 AI 行動錢包。

highlight.en: Uno is the first third-party wallet granted access by Apple to become the default contactless wallet on iPhone, building a new payment rail with a wedge in credit card points optimization.
highlight.zh: Uno 是首個獲蘋果授權成為 iPhone 預設感應支付的第三方錢包,以信用卡點數優化為切入點打造全新支付軌道。

summary.en: Growth infrastructure that runs an autonomous business's entire go-to-market.
summary.zh: 為自主企業運行整套上市策略的成長基礎設施。

highlight.en: Revnu's agents run every growth channel, outbound, ads, SEO, and social, on one shared intelligence, so learnings from one channel automatically improve all the others.
highlight.zh: Revnu 的代理人以單一共享智慧運行每個成長管道,包括陌生開發、廣告、SEO 與社群,讓單一管道的學習自動改善其他所有管道。

summary.en: A human-in-the-loop system for controlling robots from anywhere.
summary.zh: 一個可從任何地方控制機器人的人機協作系統。

highlight.en: Avea built the fastest software to control robots from anywhere in the world, letting robotics companies keep robots at 100% uptime and intervene instantly when a failure occurs.
highlight.zh: Avea 打造了從世界任何地方控制機器人最快速的軟體,讓機器人公司能維持機器人 100% 的運行時間,並在故障發生時即時介入。

summary.en: An AI operating system for clinical development that automates trial biometrics.
summary.zh: 一個自動化試驗生物統計的臨床開發 AI 作業系統。

highlight.en: Astraea automates clinical trial biometrics from raw inputs to FDA-ready outputs, handling CDISC mapping, SDTM, ADaM, TFLs, and QC to reduce months of manual programming for Phase II/III sponsors.
highlight.zh: Astraea 將臨床試驗生物統計從原始輸入自動化至可供 FDA 提交的產出,處理 CDISC 對應、SDTM、ADaM、TFL 與品管,為二/三期試驗申辦者縮減數月的手動程式編寫。

summary.en: AI-native consulting that maps and automates business processes.
summary.zh: 梳理並自動化企業流程的 AI 原生顧問服務。

highlight.en: flowscope deploys agents to map, optimize, and automate companies' processes end to end without human intervention, doing what consulting firms charge millions for at a fraction of the cost and time.
highlight.zh: flowscope 部署代理人在無人介入下端到端梳理、優化並自動化公司流程,以遠低的成本與時間完成顧問公司收費數百萬美元的工作。

summary.en: Liability insurance for AI agents so companies can deploy them with coverage.
summary.zh: 為 AI 代理人提供的責任保險,讓企業能在有保障下部署。

highlight.en: Klaimee covers what traditional E&O and cyber policies explicitly carve out for agentic AI, with self-serve coverage from day one as regulations like AB 316 and the EU AI Act hold deployers liable.
highlight.zh: 在 AB 316 與歐盟 AI 法案等法規要求部署者負責之際,Klaimee 承保傳統專業責任險與網路險明確排除的代理式 AI 風險,並從第一天起提供自助式保障。

summary.en: AI agents for property management that chase tickets and keep stakeholders updated.
summary.zh: 為物業管理打造、追蹤工單並隨時更新各方的 AI 代理人。

highlight.en: CentralComs' agents work inside AppFolio, Buildium, and Yardi to track every maintenance call, chase open tickets, and update owners, tenants, and vendors, resolving multi-step workflows without handoffs.
highlight.zh: CentralComs 的代理人在 AppFolio、Buildium 與 Yardi 內運作,追蹤每通維修來電、催辦未結工單並更新業主、租戶與廠商,無需交接即可完成多步驟工作流程。

summary.en: AI-native FDA regulatory services for biotech and medical device companies.
summary.zh: 為生技與醫療器材公司提供的 AI 原生 FDA 法規服務。

highlight.en: Panacea pairs ex-FDA consultants with its AI platform on fixed, outcome-based pricing paid only on milestones, supporting all pathways including IND, NDA, BLA, 510(k), and PMA.
highlight.zh: Panacea 將前 FDA 顧問與其 AI 平台結合,採固定且以成果為基礎、僅在里程碑完成時付款的計價方式,支援包括 IND、NDA、BLA、510(k) 與 PMA 在內的所有法規途徑。
